## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance updates, and new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Agreed to shift to biweekly meetings with async updates in between](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - ["What to Pack" series performing well, especially for long-tail keywords](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [New Tierra Sagrada Beach Club landing page in development](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Content strategy for Tierra Sagrada to focus on family-friendly angle, relaxation, and stylish atmosphere](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)

## Topics

### Meeting Cadence Change

  - [Shifting from weekly to biweekly meetings](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Will use Slack for operational topics between meetings](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Team open to reverting if biweekly cadence doesn't work well](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)

### Performance Updates

  - [Vallarta: 7% click growth, "What to Pack" series gaining traction](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Cancun: Record impressions, 4% click growth](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Cabo: Hurricane season article performing well (3rd most traffic)](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Planning "destination weather by month" series (3,000 monthly searches per keyword)](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Updating tour recommendations sheet for accurate monthly suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Tierra Sagrada content:](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
      - [Refreshing existing "Why visit Tierra Sagrada" article to include Beach Club](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
      - [New article on "Instagrammable places at Tierra Sagrada"](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
      - [Potential topics: animal welfare, certifications, activities](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)

### Tierra Sagrada Beach Club

  - [New landing page in development with video, packages, and blog content](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Positioning as family-oriented but also suitable for friend groups](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Content angles: stylish atmosphere, relaxation, "after party" recovery spot](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)

### SEO Considerations

  - [Focusing on non-branded keywords to avoid cannibalizing tour page](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Targeting terms like "Cabo with Friends," "Bachelorette in Cabo," "Cabo Girls Trip"](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [Avoiding mention of specific competitors in content](https://fathom.video/share/TfzroS8zDWW2d3zpvxKS-2BYcUk6EYVi?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
